sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92468" key="r(inegkataphcige/neios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῑν-εγκᾰτᾰπηξῐ-γένειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥίς, ἐγκαταπήγνυμι</etym>) <sense id="n92468.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a nose reaching to the chin, with a nutcracker nose and chin</tr_>, Epigr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
